message:
feat(tests): add 8 E2E evidence tests for Bayesian scorer explanations (bd-3nvpz)

Tests validate explanation payloads through the full dispatch pipeline:
- Telemetry artifact carries explanation fields (summary, contributors, budget)
- Ledger entries include schema-versioned explanation payloads with valid contributors
- Replay parity: identical traces produce identical explanation payloads (1e-12 precision)
- Contributor ordering stability (magnitude desc, code asc tiebreak)
- Calibration report works with explanation-annotated ledger entries
- Explanation level escalation under adversarial exec burst traces
- Replay steps carry explanation fields through round-trip
- Conformal/e-process fields coexist correctly with explanation fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
